(2) 16× assertion Condition not satisfied — Spock assertion failed (fixture or response shape). (3) 14× NOT_FOUND / missing data — missing DB row / EmptyResult / NOT_FOUND. (4) 14× API ValidationException — API rejected the request (business validation).
